'''Meddun''' was a [[Kajain'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kajain'sa'Nikto]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].
When [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] won the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]], Meddun was present in the city. After the match he was in [[Slave Quarters Row/Legends|Mos Espa Slave Quarters]] when [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] told the news about Anakin's release to [[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker]] and Anakin himself.
